message:
perf(protocol): Optimize schema validation algorithms

Two optimizations in JSON Schema validation:

1. additionalProperties: Avoid Vec allocation
   - Before: Collected property keys into Vec, then used Vec::contains (O(n))
   - After: Use Map::contains_key directly (O(1))

2. uniqueItems: O(n²) to O(n) with HashSet
   - Before: Vec::contains per item = O(n²) total
   - After: HashSet with serialized JSON keys = O(n) total
   - For 1000-item arrays: ~500k comparisons → ~1k hash inserts

Isomorphism: Output identical - same validation errors for same inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
